title: wholesome hangover Uruguayan yoghurt bowl
description: fresh, crunchy, hangover-cure uruguayan dish featuring natural yoghurt, deglaze, whole30-friendly, vessel=cazuela. Perfect for a morning pick-me-up after a long night out.
instructions: In a small saucepan, heat the coconut oil over low heat.
Add the chopped scallions and cook for 2 minutes, or until softened.
Add the diced mango, pineapple, red bell pepper, and grated carrot. Cook for 3 minutes, or until the vegetables have softened slightly.
Add the diced apple and cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until tender.
Stir in the honey, cinnamon, and a pinch of salt and pepper. Cook for 1 minute, or until the honey has dissolved.
Stir in the chopped pecans and shredded coconut. Cook for an additional 1 minute, or until the pecans are toasted and fragrant.
In a large bowl, combine the Greek yoghurt, sour cream, diced avocado, and chopped fresh mint. Stir until well combined.
Add the cooked mango mixture to the yoghurt mixture and stir until well combined.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the Uruguayan yoghurt bowl in a large ceramic bowl, garnished with additional fresh mint if desired.
Top with diced walnuts and a sprinkle of sesame seeds, if desired.
Enjoy your delicious and refreshing Uruguayan yoghurt bowl!
Be sure to top with your choice of toppings, such as diced mango, pineapple, red bell pepper, or grated carrot.
Garnish with fresh mint leaves and serve immediately.
